ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ORELLANA, HORATIO

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORELLANA, HORATIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 378 CAPP STREET, SF, CA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-01-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. SHALL RECOVER $3,848.00 UNPAID RENTS/DAMAGES FROM DEFT BUT IF DEFT VACATES PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 7/31/95 PLTF. WAIVES ANY AND ALL CLAIMS TO UNPAID RENTS OR DAMAGES FROM DEFTS. PLTF. WILL ALSO REFUND TO DEFT THE SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $387.50. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
